results.rendered_html:
saṃ-√sṛj P. Ā. -sṛjati, ˚te (2. sg. aor. -srāḥ,  AV. ), to hit with (instr.),  RV. i, 33, 13 ;
to visit or afflict with (instr.),  AV. xi, 2, 26 ;
to join or unite or mix or mingle or endow or present with (instr.),  RV. ;  AV. ;  VS. ;  Br. ;  Āp. ;  MBh. ;
(with yudhaḥ) to engage in battle,  AV. x, 10, 24 ;
to create,  ŚvetUp. ;  Pur. ;
(Ā.) to share anything with others,  MaitrS. ;
(Ā. or Pass.) to join one's self, be joined or united or mingled or confused, come into contact with, meet (as friends or foes, also applied to sexual intercourse; with instr. with or without saha),  RV.  &c. &c.:
Caus. -sarjayati, to attract, win over, conciliate,  Baudh. ;  Kām. ;
to furnish with (instr.), provide any one with anything,  Car.  :
Desid. -sisṛkṣati, to wish to create together or to partake of creation,  BhP.

results.rendered_html:
saṃsṛj 6 P.
1 To mix, mingle, unite with, bring in contact with; saṃsṛjyate sarasijairaruṇāṃśubhinnaiḥ  R. 5. 69.  asnā rakṣaḥ saṃsṛjatāt  Ait. Br. 
2 To join, meet; saumitriṇā tadanu saṃsasṛje  R. 13. 73 ;  Ku. 7. 74. 
3 To create, form.
4 To endow or furnish with.
